nasb.text: “Also if a woman makes a vow to the Lord, and binds herself by an obligation in her father’s house in her youth,

esv.text: “If a woman vows a vow to the Lord and binds herself by a pledge, while within her father’s house in her youth,

cnv.text: 女子年幼還在父家的時候，如果向耶和華許願要約束自己，

ccb.text: 倘若未出嫁的少女在什么事上向耶和华许愿或起誓，
